positive: A stylized, high-contrast minimalist scene depicting a serene astronaut floating among bioluminescent cosmic flora and crystalline nebula formations. The astronaut is seen in a clean, iconic silhouette against a deep indigo and violet gradient background, with vibrant bursts of teal and magenta light illuminating the scene from within the flora. Use clean line work, strong geometric composition, and a detailed, sci-fi etching aesthetic, optimized for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, symmetrical balance, dramatic rim lighting.
